adminHelp: Sign in with your corporate Google account.
employeeHelp: Get a sign-in link sent to your work email.
linkSentBody: We've sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Open it on this device.
domainNotAllowed: Your email domain is not authorized.
emailNotRegistered: This email is not registered in the system.
popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the popup. Allow popups and try again.
popupClosed: The popup was closed before sign-in completed. Please try again.
genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
providerNotEnabled: This sign-in method is not enabled in the Firebase project. Enable Google in Authentication → Sign-in method.
accountExistsDifferentCred: An account with this email already exists with a different sign-in method.
networkError: Cannot reach the server. Check your internet and try again.
tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
needEmailBody: To finish signing in, enter the same email the link was sent to.
invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
accountDisabled: Your account has been deactivated by an administrator. Please contact a super admin.
